Booklet Print Visualizer

4.75" × 4.75" — 8 pages — saddle stitch — 300 DPI

Cover
—
Sheet 1 — Outer wrapper
Side A — Outside (face up, print first)
PG 8 — Back Cover / Shoes
PG 1 — Front Cover / Face
↓ flip on short edge ↓
Side B — Inside (face down, print second)
PG 2 — Demon Figure
PG 7 — Red Text
Sheet 2 — Inner insert
Side A — Outside (face up, print first)
PG 6 — Sicarius Spider
PG 3 — Men in Car

Side B — Inside (center spread)
PG 4 — Collage Left
PG 5 — Collage Right
PDF PageSheetSideLeft HalfRight Half
1Sheet 1OutsidePG 8 Back Cover / ShoesPG 1 Front Cover / Face
2Sheet 1InsidePG 2 Demon FigurePG 7 Red Text
3Sheet 2OutsidePG 6 Sicarius SpiderPG 3 Men in Car
4Sheet 2Inside ★PG 4 Collage LeftPG 5 Collage Right
★ Center spread: PG 4 + PG 5 print as one continuous 9.5" image — no interruption at the fold.

At OfficeMax: Duplex / flip on short edge / no scaling / borderless.
Print Sheet 1, then Sheet 2. Nest Sheet 2 inside Sheet 1, fold, center-staple.
